title: quercus obtusa var. obovatifolia
intro: Quercus obtusa var. obovatifolia, a subspecies of the evergreen oak tree, is a plant native to East Asia, characterized by its broad, rounded leaves and sturdy branches. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Quercus obtusa var. obovatifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Quercus obtusa var. obovatifolia can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
